description: Divides a line segment in a given ratio using the section formula. Supports internal division, external division, and midpoint.
utility: Find the point that divides a segment in a given ratio

arguments.name: m
arguments.description: First ratio component (or single ratio for midpoint form)

alternates.description: Point dividing AB internally in ratio m:n

alternates.syntax: section3d(G, A, B, m, n, type(external))
alternates.description: Point dividing AB externally in ratio m:n

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = point3d(G, 1, 2, 3)
B = point3d(G, 4, 6, 8)
P = section3d(G, A, B, 2, 3)
